reason: Bitcoin has slipped below a key psychological and technical support level ($69,500) amidst escalating geopolitical tensions driving oil prices higher (implying inflation concerns), creating risk-off sentiment. Further regulatory clarity through combined SEC/CFTC oversight, while potentially beneficial long-term, introduces short-term uncertainty and increased scrutiny. Security incidents (Bonk.fun hack) contribute to overall market FUD, increasing downside risk despite some positive growth metrics from exchanges like Bullish.
headlines: XRP steadies near $1.38 as Bollinger squeeze hints at breakout before CPI
Bitcoin slips below $69,500 as tanker attacks send oil back above $100
Bonk.fun hacked: Domain hijacked, crypto drainer planted
SEC, CFTC end years of rivalry with deal that will mean combined crypto oversight
Crypto platform Bullish climbs past Coinbase to become third-largest crypto exchange by spot volume
